--- php5.diff begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 317992)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	php5
-PORTVERSION=	5.4.14
+PORTVERSION=	5.4.15
 PORTREVISION?=	0
 CATEGORIES?=	lang devel www
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PHP}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo	(revision 317992)
+++ distinfo	(working copy)
